message:
fix(codegen): Register 11 additional internal modules for codecs, compression, and regex

Add registrations for:
- _codecs: Codec registry and encoding/decoding
- _locale: Locale and internationalization support
- _imp: Import system internals
- _lzma: LZMA compression
- _pickle: Fast pickle protocol implementation
- _pydecimal: Python decimal implementation
- _pyio: Pure Python I/O implementation
- _pylong: Long integer operations
- _sre: Regular expression engine (compiled patterns)
- _sqlite3: SQLite database interface
- _stat: File stat constants and helpers

These are critical modules for:
- Text encoding/decoding operations
- Data serialization (pickle)
- Database operations (sqlite3)
- Regular expression matching (sre)
- Compression (lzma)

Test:
- import _pickle; import _sqlite3; import _sre; -> works
- import _codecs; import _locale; import _lzma; -> works
